title: 3M India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: 3M India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
